remarks: Pet friendly and beautifully maintained 1-bedroom condo nestled in a quiet, peaceful neighborhood. Enjoy the great sized bedroom with ample space, along with a spacious living room perfect for both everyday living and entertaining. The kitchen has been updated with a modern backsplash and newer appliances, offering both style and functionality. The bathroom has been fully renovated. Enjoy the convenience of one assigned parking space, with additional guest parking available in spots #1 and #8. 10x8 Assigned storage space in building. A wonderful opportunity to own a move-in ready home in a serene setting. New AC wall units also included in sale. Close to major transportation.
